messagingGuides.approvedLanguage: The Blocks secondary market provides token holders with the ability to list and sell their tokens to other verified investors. Trading is peer-to-peer with settlement processed on-chain.
messagingGuides.prohibitedLanguage: Do not use 'instant liquidity', 'guaranteed buyers', or 'trade anytime' as these imply guaranteed market depth.
messagingGuides.evidenceRequired: Secondary market trading volume data, average time-to-sell metrics, number of active buyers

messagingGuides.approvedLanguage: Blocks charges transparent fees for token purchases and management services. All fees are disclosed before transaction confirmation. There are no hidden charges.
messagingGuides.prohibitedLanguage: Do not claim 'lowest fees in the market' without competitive comparison data. Avoid 'zero fees' unless specifically approved promotion.
messagingGuides.evidenceRequired: Published fee schedule, competitive fee comparison, regulatory compliance with VARA fee disclosure rules

messagingGuides.approvedLanguage: Blocks enables property owners and developers to unlock capital through tokenization, reaching a global investor base while maintaining operational control of their assets.
messagingGuides.prohibitedLanguage: Avoid implying Blocks replaces traditional real estate agents or brokers. Do not make claims about specific ROI for partners.
messagingGuides.evidenceRequired: Platform metrics, case studies of successful tokenizations, partner testimonials

messagingGuides.approvedLanguage: Blocks platform is built on enterprise-grade blockchain infrastructure with multi-layer security controls, regular penetration testing, and compliance with industry security standards.
messagingGuides.prohibitedLanguage: Avoid 'unhackable', '100% secure', or specific comparisons to other blockchain platforms.
messagingGuides.evidenceRequired: Security audit reports, penetration testing results, infrastructure architecture documentation

messagingGuides.approvedLanguage: Q3 launch represents a major milestone in our product roadmap. The Managed Tokenization Marketplace positions Blocks as the leading platform in the region.
messagingGuides.prohibitedLanguage: Internal only. Do not share specific launch dates externally until confirmed.
messagingGuides.evidenceRequired: Product roadmap, competitive positioning analysis, market readiness assessment

feeStructure.feePurpose: Covers platform infrastructure, security, compliance, and operational costs for facilitating token transactions.
excludedServices: Valuation reports (charged separately by valuation partner)
feeStructure.financeTreatment: Recognized as revenue at settlement. Deferred revenue recognition for membership fees.
feeStructure.approvedCustomerCopy: Blocks charges a 0.5% trading fee on each token transaction. This fee covers platform operations, security, and compliance. All fees are transparently displayed before you confirm any transaction.

feeStructureHistory.feePurpose: Annual fee for platform access including portfolio tracking, reporting, and priority support.
feeStructureHistory.approvedCustomerCopy: Annual platform membership is $199 per year and includes portfolio tracking, reporting, and priority support.

90days.description: 90-day product marketing dashboard with launch readiness, messaging approval velocity, and content completion rates.

12months.description: 12-month strategic product marketing dashboard with annual product launch success and messaging maturity.
